chapter_title.en: Chapter on the Divorce of a Pregnant Woman

text: 4787 - رَوَى زُرَارَةُ عَنْ أَبِي جَعْفَرٍ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : "طَلاَقُ اَلْحَامِلِ وَاحِدَةٌ فَإِذَا وَضَعَتْ مَا فِي بَطْنِهَا فَقَدْ بَانَتْ مِنْهُ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.4787 - Zurarah narrated from Abu Ja'far Imam Muhammad ibn Ali Al-Baqir (as):
"The divorce of a pregnant woman is a single divorce, and once she delivers what is in her womb, she is separated from him."
